items.title: 1st Place — InnovateX Hackathon 2025
items.description: Code Troopers team 'ByteForce' secured 1st place among 45 teams with their AI-powered campus navigation solution.

items.title: 2nd Place — State Level Coding Contest
items.description: Three club members ranked in the top 5 at the Karnataka State Coding Championship 2025.

items.title: Workbench Learning Platform
items.description: Built an internal learning management platform serving 150+ members with structured roadmaps, assessments, and progress tracking.

items.title: Smart Attendance System
items.description: PD Team 2 developed a QR-based attendance system adopted by the CSE department for club events and workshops.

items.title: AWS Cloud Practitioner — 12 Members
items.description: Twelve Code Troopers members earned AWS Cloud Practitioner certification through structured study groups and mock exams.

items.title: Google Developer Student Clubs Lead
items.description: Club Head certified as GDSC Lead, enabling cross-collaboration with Google's developer community programs.

items.title: 500+ Workshop Participants Reached
items.description: Code Troopers workshops and bootcamps have trained over 500 students across departments in the 2025-26 academic year.

items.title: Open Source Contributions — 200+ PRs
items.description: Club members collectively merged 200+ pull requests across open source projects and internal repositories.

items.title: Best Technical Club Award 2025
items.description: Recognized as the Best Technical Club at the annual college cultural and technical fest for outstanding event quality and member growth.

items.title: Excellence in Innovation — Dean's Award
items.description: Received the Dean Research Excellence Award for the InnovateX Hackathon and its impact on student entrepreneurship.
